Document: # The Corporate War Approximately 200 years ago, a massive corporate war between the mega-corporation [color=#2688D3]NanoTrasen[/color] and the anti-NT conglomerate known as the [color=red]Spinward Syndicate[/color] began. This war was devastating for both sides, with [color=#2688D3]NanoTrasen[/color] being utterly destroyed; most of its subsidiaries and employees returning to the Sol System, where a large heap NT's ex-employees assimilated into the vast amount of factions and companies within the Solarian Directives, an organization founded by the Federated Solarian Republic (Sol System's government), which was their way of expanding Sol's reaches throughout the galaxy. The [color=red]Spinward Syndicate[/color] did survive, but they were heavily fractured, many of its corporations and organizations eventually fading to time, infighting, or the blow from the war. Nowadays, the memory of the [color=red]Syndicate[/color] lives on through pieces of history found in the vast vacuum of space such as spare Gorlex hardsuits, half-empty kits of Interdyne's hyperzine injectors, or perhaps even a small cell of Syndicates that were in cryosleep for a little [italic]too[/italic] long.
